target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; debris pile covers ground level; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements completely destroyed; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The right wing of the building shows complete collapse of its upper floors and roof; structural elements are missing; debris pile indicates total loss of structural integrity; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, both showing extensive structural collapse and debris piles exceeding 75% of visible area. The overall scene depicts a street-level view of severely damaged multi-story buildings with collapsed roofs, missing walls, and widespread rubble, with a single car parked on the debris-strewn road. The functional impact is likely complete loss of habitation and commercial use for the affected structures.
